privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ACIKY we respect your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights as a user of the platform.
privacy.collect1: Name, last name, and spiritual name (when you register)
privacy.collect4: Testimonials you choose to submit voluntarily
privacy.collect5: A functional session cookie to keep you logged in
privacy.useTitle: How do we use your data?
privacy.use1: To manage your account and access to the platform
privacy.use2: To display your name and photo on approved testimonials
privacy.use3: To send you relevant ACIKY information if you requested it
privacy.cookies: We only use a functional session cookie required for you to log in. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.thirdParty: Your images are stored on Cloudinary. The platform is hosted on Heroku and GitHub Pages. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.retention: We keep your data while your account is active. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time.
privacy.rights1: Access the data we hold about you
privacy.rights4: Withdraw your testimonial at any time
privacy.contact: For any privacy-related questions, contact us via WhatsApp or through our contact page.
